hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: From concept to installation — everything you need for a perfectly furnished space.

items.title: Wardrobes
items.text: Built-in, sliding, and walk-in wardrobes designed to maximise storage in any room. Custom dimensions, finishes, and interior fittings.

items.title: Office Furniture
items.text: Functional and elegant office solutions — desks, bookshelves, cabinets, and complete workstation setups tailored to your workspace.

items.title: Tables
items.text: Handcrafted dining tables, coffee tables, and work desks in a range of materials and sizes. Built to last and made to impress.

items.title: Living Room Furniture
items.text: TV units, shelving systems, and storage compositions that bring style and order to your living space.

items.title: Design Consultation
items.text: Not sure where to start? Our team visits your home, takes measurements, and works with you to design the ideal solution.

items.title: Manufacturing & Installation
items.text: We handle the full process — precision manufacturing in our workshop followed by professional on-site assembly and installation.

cta.text: Ready to start your project? Get in touch and we'll arrange a free consultation.
